content:
💡 File_Converter_Pro | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide Windows users with a free, offline, and feature-rich desktop application for converting various file types without requiring an internet connection or uploading files.
✨ Key Features: • All-in-one conversion (documents, images, audio, video) • 100% Offline & Private • Polished UI with Dark/Light mode and animations
📖 Summary: File Converter Pro is a free, offline, all-in-one file conversion desktop application for Windows. It supports documents, images, audio, and video, offering a polished user interface with features like dark/light themes and a statistics dashboard, all built with Python and PySide6.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
